name: Perfect Pilaf
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup vermicelli noodles, broken in small pieces
1 can ready-to-serve chicken or beef broth (14 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, brown the mushrooms and vermicelli noodles over medium heat, stirring occasionally.
2. Add the broth and rice to the saucepan.
3. Cover and bring to a boil.
4. Reduce the heat and cook for 20 minutes or until the rice and pasta are tender. Stir occasionally.
5. Makes about 3 cups.
